channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Learning to Drive in Your 30s: Overcoming Multiple Failures
item.description: At 35, the author decided it was finally time to get their driver’s licence, a task they had long postponed. Growing up, driving seemed intimidating and uncool compared to public transport. Moving to ...

item.title: Team Block X Develops AI Platform Connecting Informal Workers to Digital Finance
item.description: Guaranty Trust Holding Company Plc, through its fintech arm HabariPay, don announce say Team ‘Block X’ na di winner of di Squad Hackathon 3.0. Di competition gather some of di sharpest young software ...

item.title: Trump Holds Off Iran Attack as Diplomatic Talks Show Progress
item.description: On May 19, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump announced a postponement of a planned military strike on Iran, signalling optimism for ongoing diplomatic negotiations aimed at ending the Iran-Israel conf...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes: Nichelle Nichols Practicing Ballet While Filming Star Trek
item.description: These newly uncovered behind-the-scenes photographs from the original Star Trek series reveal Nichelle Nichols, who played Lt. Uhura, practicing ballet moves while in her iconic red Starfleet uniform....

item.title: Outbreak of Bundibugyo Ebola in Congo and Uganda Lacks Approved Vaccine
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak is spreading across the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, caused by the Bundibugyo strain, for which no approved vaccine or treatment currently exists. Identified in 2007, ...

item.title: Tobi Amusan finishes third in women’s 100m hurdles at Shanghai Diamond League
item.description: Nigerian sprint hurdler Tobi Amusan clocked 12.41 seconds to finish third in the women’s 100m hurdles at the opening of the 2026 Diamond League in Shanghai on Saturday. Fresh from her gold medal win a...

item.title: Mark Fuhrman, LAPD Detective in OJ Simpson Trial, Passes Away at 74
item.description: Mark Fuhrman, the controversial Los Angeles Police Department detective, who became widely known for his involvement in the 1994 OJ Simpson murder investigation, has died at the age of 74. Fuhrman, wh...

item.title: WHO warns that recent Ebola and hantavirus outbreaks reflect global health risks
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has expressed concern over the recent outbreaks of Ebola and hantavirus, calling them indicators of increasingly risky global health conditions. These viruses, both...

item.title: Understanding the Role of ‘The Other Woman’ in Modern Kenyan Marriages
item.description: In Kenya, the presence of ‘the other woman’, also called mpango wa kando or side chick, remains a complex social phenomenon. The article explores how extramarital relationships intersect with culture,...

item.title: SandboxAQ Makes Advanced Drug Discovery Models Accessible Through Claude AI
item.description: SandboxAQ, a company founded as an Alphabet spinout about five years ago, is simplifying access to complex drug discovery and materials science models by integrating them into Anthropic's Claude AI pl...

item.title: Legal Expert Criticizes Supreme Court for Focusing on Policy Rather than Statutory Interpretation in Mail-In Ballot Case
item.description: Legal experts have criticized the U.S. Supreme Court for its handling of Watson v. R.N.C., a case questioning whether federal law allows counting mail-in ballots received after election day. Georgetow...

item.title: Three suspects granted bail in R26m UIF Ters fraud case in Mpumalanga
item.description: The Mpumalanga specialised commercial crimes court has granted bail to three individuals implicated in a R26 million fraud related to the Covid-19 Temporary Employer/Employee Relief Scheme (Ters). Fum...

item.title: Supreme Court issues guidelines to standardise civil pleadings and trial procedures
item.description: ISLAMABAD: On Monday, the Supreme Court of Pakistan issued detailed guidelines aimed at improving uniformity and quality of civil pleadings at trial courts. The 26-page judgement, authored by Justice ...

item.title: Brampton authorities temporarily close park over safety concerns related to gatherings and fireworks
item.description: Peel Regional Police announced the temporary closure of a park in Brampton following reports of large gatherings and the use of fireworks, which posed safety risks to the public. The police emphasized...

item.title: Training Programme Scheduled for 7,000 Newly Appointed Maharashtra Congress Office-Bearers
item.description: The Maharashtra Congress has scheduled a four-day training camp from 26th to 29th May at Tilak Bhawan, the state party headquarters, for 7,000 newly appointed office-bearers. The programme will be con...

item.title: Uganda enacts law requiring government approval for foreign-backed policy work
item.description: Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni has signed the 'Protection of Sovereignty' bill into law, following parliamentary amendments that softened some of its earlier, more controversial provisions. The leg...

item.title: MP Oscar Sudi Condemns Petrol Attack on Woman Allegedly Targeted Over Ruto Tattoo
item.description: Nairobi has been shaken after a woman, identified as Rachael Muthoni, suffered severe injuries from an attack where she was doused in petrol. The incident reportedly relates to a tattoo she has of Pre...

item.title: Federal Government Urges Provinces to Boost Revenue Collection to Meet IMF Targets
item.description: The federal government has requested Pakistan’s provinces to raise their revenue contribution by an additional Rs400 billion in the next fiscal year, roughly 40 per cent more than their current share....

item.title: Henning May’s Career and Life Journey with AnnenMayKantereit
item.description: Henning May, a German singer and songwriter born on 13 January 1992 in Cologne, has become widely known as the lead vocalist of the pop-rock band AnnenMayKantereit. Growing up in the Sülz district wit...

item.title: Authorities investigate fatal shooting at San Diego Islamic Centre involving teen suspects
item.description: San Diego authorities are investigating a tragic shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego, which resulted in the deaths of three adults and two teen suspects. The incident occurred just before noon...
